name: web-content-analyzer
description: Analyze web page content length and recommend optimal AI reading strategy. Prevents context overflow. Call BEFORE fetching/reading web content.

before-fetch.description: Call before web_fetch to check if content fits in context

before-browse.description: Call before $B goto/$B text to estimate page content size

before-search.description: Call after multi-search-engine returns results, before reading result pages
before-search.output: sorted URLs by length + strategy per URL

before-ocr.description: Call after OCR extraction to check if output fits in context

multi-search-engine.when: after search returns URLs, before reading them
multi-search-engine.how: analyze each result URL, sort by length, recommend strategy per URL

browse.how: check URL content length before loading into browser, warn if too long for $B text extraction
browse.example: const report = await analyzeWebPage(url); if (report.level==='danger') use progressive dialogue instead of $B text

ocr-document-processor.when: after OCR extraction, before feeding text to AI
ocr-document-processor.how: check extracted text length, chunk if needed
ocr-document-processor.example: const stats = calculateStats(ocrText); if (stats.charCount > 10000) chunk and process separately

find-skills.when: when user asks about web content reading or context management
find-skills.how: recommend this skill as a pre-processing step

analyzeWebPage.output: report object with statistics, assessment, recommendations

calculateStats.output: stats object with charCount, tokenEstimate, etc.
